generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current (I_M) as control input and torque (τ_M) as output"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Intermediate gearbox component in the transmission chain with torque amplification (τ_G) before cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Final cycloidal gearbox component producing output torque (τ_out) with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
]

instance SafetyCell : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Mechanical safety cell restricting operational range to [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed to 75°/s"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted motor encoder measuring angular position for primary position feedback"
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox-mounted encoder behind the gearbox providing secondary position measurement to reduce backlash/positional uncertainty"
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures input current (I_M) via MQTT protocol for real-time control monitoring"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance EncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Derived torque values computed from manufacturer-specific dynamics models"
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) measurements derived from encoder readings"
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration measurements computed from velocity data"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing first axis structure (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox) and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing rotational/torque and electrical/current flows within the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction components for gearbox simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction model for dynamic friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink LuGre friction model for comprehensive friction characterization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current (I_M) measurements from current sensor via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor torque (τ_M) measurements derived from current and encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData, EncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelValidationService
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) measurements from encoder readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output torque values from friction models (τr_M, τr_G, τr_out) for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelValidationService
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position measurements from both encoders for positional uncertainty reduction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming (current, torque, velocity) to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, ModelValidationService, VisualizationDashboard
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard integrating live data and friction analysis results"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboard
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to detect friction-induced discrepancies and enable continuous model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDiscrepancyInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live data (current, torque, angular velocity) and friction models via concrete digital shadow models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static friction components in the gearbox"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of kinetic friction components during operational motion"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of viscous friction components affecting system dynamics"
]

instance ModelDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of discrepancies between simulated and measured data indicating friction-induced inaccuracies"
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic iterative model updates based on continuous validation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live operational data and friction model outputs for decision-making"
]

// C1: System Environment
instance FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, CycloidalGearbox, SafetyCell
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)** with:
  - **Data Acquisition Frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) is streamed at **high frequency** (implied by live measurements and MQTT protocol).
  - **Model Update Rate**: Friction models are dynamically updated during operation to reflect **operational changes** (e.g., wear, load variations).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned temporally to ensure **coherent analysis** of friction effects over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized Digital Shadow**: A **concrete realization** of the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) incorporating:
    - **Purpose**: Friction analysis for motion accuracy improvement.
    - **Asset**: First axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot.
    - **Processing Components**: Simulation models (e.g., **Simulation M**, **Simulation GW**, **Simulation GB**) linked to data traces via **traceability associations**.
    - **Data Traces**: Measured and simulated data (e.g., **I_M**, **r_M**, **ˆr_M**) with metadata for origin and computation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **operational phase** of the physical system, focusing on:
  - **As Operated**: Real-time monitoring and friction modeling during robot operation to improve motion accuracy.
  - **Representation Phase**: The digital shadow provides a **live, multi-physics-aware** representation of the first axis, enabling continuous adaptation of friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**: Comparison of simulated friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) with live measurements to validate accuracy.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Traceability of data sources (e.g., encoder channels) allows root-cause analysis of deviations.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Dynamic exchange of friction models via **Asset Administration Shells (AAS)** and **SysML** ensures conformance to operational requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for real-time sensor data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D).
  - **Network Architecture**: Data traces are linked to simulation models via **concrete digital shadow UML class diagrams** (e.g., Fig. 5) for traceability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: Standardized concepts (e.g., **Purpose**, **DataTrace**, **Model**) from [15].
  - **SysML**: Standard modeling language for structural/functional descriptions.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: Standardized framework for integrating robot data (implied by friction model integration)."
]
